name: Home Assistant
description: Home Assistant entity states as rows on the split-flap wall

settings.label: Entities
settings.note: Search to add entities. Reorder with the arrows, rename, and set numeric thresholds — a value gets a green flap below low, amber between, red above high. In the add-on this works automatically; standalone Docker needs COMPANION_HA_URL + COMPANION_HA_TOKEN set.
